'''Galleefryn II''' was a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].<ref name="TTABSB" />

It was freed from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in a struggle that took place more than [[6 BBY/Legends|ten years]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TTABSB" />

{{Planet-stub}}
